# gcore_cdn_trusted_ca_certificate (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gcore_cdn_trusted_ca_certificate" "example_cdn_trusted_ca_certificate" {
  id = 0
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `cert_issuer` (String) Name of the certification center that issued the CA certificate.
- `cert_subject_alt` (String) Alternative domain names that the CA certificate secures.
- `cert_subject_cn` (String) Domain name that the CA certificate secures.
- `deleted` (Boolean) Defines whether the certificate has been deleted. Parameter is **deprecated**.

Possible values:
- **true** - Certificate has been deleted.
- **false** - Certificate has not been deleted.
- `has_related_resources` (Boolean) Defines whether the CA certificate is used by a CDN resource.

Possible values:
- **true** - Certificate is used by a CDN resource.
- **false** - Certificate is not used by a CDN resource.
- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String) CA certificate name.
- `ssl_certificate_chain` (String) Parameter is **deprecated**.
- `validity_not_after` (String) Date when the CA certificate become untrusted (ISO 8601/RFC 3339 format, UTC.)
- `validity_not_before` (String) Date when the CA certificate become valid (ISO 8601/RFC 3339 format, UTC.)
